---
title: "Figure 5 (covariance contour) — macro_IR corrected parameter covariance over the (interval, N_ch) plane, N_ch-normalised"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Filled contour of the DIAGONAL of the CORRECTED (distortion-corrected / sandwich) parameter
covariance, N_ch-NORMALISED (multiplied by N_ch, removing the trivial Cov ~ 1/N_ch scaling so the
per-channel precision is comparable across N_ch). Plane x = interval, y = N_ch; faceted parameter
(rows) x noise (columns). Per-recording (group of 100): battery covariance x 1/100. ALGO = macro_IR.
Reads: what stays flat in N_ch scales as 1/N_ch (kinetics); what grows is a worsening degeneracy (i, N_ch).
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR   <- "../data/433ed13"
NSIM       <- 10000
NOISES     <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
ALGO       <- "macro_IR"
GROUP_SIZE <- 100
COV_SCALE  <- 1 / GROUP_SIZE

ORD       <- c("on", "off", "unitary_current", "Num_ch_mean")
PIDX      <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
               unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")
```

```{r read}
read_tagged <- function(z) {
  files <- Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_battery_sim.csv", NSIM, ALGO, z)))
  map_dfr(files, ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% mutate(noise = z))
}
bsim <- map_dfr(NOISES, read_tagged)

dd <- bsim %>%
  filter(component_path == "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance",
         statistic == "value", probit == "mean", param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX) %>%
  mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)]) %>%
  group_by(noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name) %>%
  summarise(cov = mean(value) * COV_SCALE, .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(is.finite(cov), cov > 0,
         !(noise == "10" & Num_ch == 5)) %>%   # noise 10 / N_ch 5: sandwich unstable, drop
  mutate(val = Num_ch * cov,
         lx  = log10(interval_in_tau), ly = log10(Num_ch),
         param  = factor(param_name, levels = ORD, labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ORD])),
         noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)))
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 8.0}
X_BRK <- log10(c(.01, .1, 1));           X_LAB <- c(".01", ".1", "1")
Y_BRK <- log10(c(10, 100, 1000, 10000)); Y_LAB <- c("10", "100", "1e3", "1e4")
rng   <- range(dd$val)
BRKS  <- 10^seq(floor(log10(rng[1])), ceiling(log10(rng[2])), by = .5)

g <- ggplot(dd, aes(lx, ly, z = val)) +
  geom_contour_filled(breaks = BRKS) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(name = expression(N[ch] %*% Cov[diag]), drop = FALSE) +
  geom_point(size = .3, colour = "grey30") +
  facet_grid(param ~ noisef, labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = X_BRK, labels = X_LAB) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = Y_BRK, labels = Y_LAB) +
  labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]), y = expression(N[ch]),
       title = "macro_IR  N_ch-normalised CORRECTED covariance (diagonal)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "right",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 7), strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
g
ggsave("Figure_5_covariance_contour.pdf", g, width = 7.0, height = 8.0)
```
